offer: For restaurant accountants processing 10–20 tip reports/month, inefficient manual compilation causes compliance issues. We automate tip reporting instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient manual compilation of tip reports leading to errors and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant accountants
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to restaurant accountants with demo video
Community forums where accountants share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for tip data and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
